name: Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Graham flour or whole wheat flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together white flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. Add graham or whole wheat flour to the sifted ingredients.
3. In a separate bowl, combine brown sugar, cold water, molasses, and milk.
4. Gradually add the wet mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until well combined.
5. Fold in chopped nuts and raisins.
6. Pour the batter into well-oiled baking pans.
7. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool before serving.
